SEARCH
Package com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation

Class EndpointRelation

java.lang.Object
com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.model.relation.EndpointRelation
Direct Known Subclasses:
ReadManyToManyEndpointRelation, ReadManyToOneEndpointRelation, ReadOneToManyEndpointRelation, ReadOneToOneEndpointRelation, ServiceRepositoryEndpointRelation
public abstract class EndpointRelation extends Object
Abstract base class for defining extra endpoints related to entity associations or methods.
